texto: For an economic recovery program to be effective, it must not only create a short-term economic boost but also generate lasting value. Home Star would accomplish that by breaking down the key barrier between homeowners and money-saving retrofits: upfront costs.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Peter Welch sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “For an economic recovery program to be effective, it must not only create a short-term economic b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, value, down, útil em momentos de down e recovery.
